name: Catfish Frangelica, Lafitte's Landing
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare 2 lb of Catfish fillets (5-7 oz each)
2. Season with salt to taste and a pinch of Cayenne pepper for heat
3. Dust with Paprika for color
4. Heat 1/2 cup melted Butter or margarine in a pan
5. Add 1/4 cup Dry white wine and stir
6. Deglaze the pan with 2 tablespoons Lemon juice
7. Sprinkle 1/4 cup Pecan halves on top
8. Finish by adding 2 tablespoons of butter and gently combine
